findings.description: The original PDF uses indented outline numbering format (1)(a)(i) with hierarchical indentation, while HTML uses a flattened list style (1. a. i.) with less visual hierarchy distinction
findings.evidence: PDF shows (1), (a), (i), (ii) etc. with deep indentation levels; HTML shows 1., a., i., ii. with simpler indentation

findings.description: Some coordinate values in HTML appear to have encoding artifacts (special characters replacing degree symbols or spaces)
findings.evidence: In HTML page 2, Dough Creek description shows '35⁠ 54.7103' N - 75⁠ 40.0951'' with potential Unicode characters instead of standard degree notation as in the PDF '35° 54.7103' N - 75° 40.0951' W'

findings.description: HTML converts the deeply nested hierarchical outline structure of the regulation into a flatter visual presentation, reducing the visual distinction between nesting levels
findings.evidence: PDF has 5+ levels of indentation with clear visual hierarchy (section numbers, letters, roman numerals, sub-letters); HTML shows the same content but with less pronounced indentation differences

findings.description: Sanders Creek coordinates in HTML section 12(c) appear to have encoding issues with special characters replacing spaces in coordinate values
findings.evidence: HTML shows '34⁠ 42.4694' N - 76⁠ 58.3754'' with potential non-breaking space or other Unicode characters; PDF shows clean '34° 42.4694' N - 76° 58.3754' W'

findings.description: Nested duplicate <main> tags in the HTML structure
findings.evidence: The HTML contains <main> nested inside another <main> element, which is invalid HTML structure but does not affect content fidelity.

findings.description: Missing degree symbols in Dough Creek coordinates for the canal crossing line
findings.evidence: PDF: '35° 54.7103' N - 75° 40.0951' W' with degree symbols. HTML: '35 54.7103' N - 75 40.0951' W' without degree symbols. This matches the source PDF text which also appears to lack degree symbols for this particular line in the original document.

findings.description: Missing degree symbols in Sanders Creek coordinates
findings.evidence: PDF: '34 42.4694' N - 76 58.3754' W' and '34 42.4903' N - 76 58.1434' W'. HTML matches this - both lack degree symbols, consistent with source PDF.
The entire document content appears once in the HTML without repetition.
